pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade wro4j version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of wro4j may fail to compile or run on Java 17 due to internal API changes or bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo version to a release compatible with Java 17 class files.
pom.xml.why_exists: JaCoCo 0.8.8 does not support Java 17 class file format (class version 61.0), causing instrumentation failures at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Lombok 1.18.24 may have issues with Java 17 module system or newer compiler internals, potentially causing annotation processing failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct on Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, Lombok and MapStruct may conflict during annotation processing on newer JDKs, leading to compile errors or missing generated code.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Remove unused import of the Lombok 'val' keyword.
Replace Lombok 'val' with Java 10+ 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17 serialization rules.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Java 17 enables strong encapsulation of the internal API java.io.ObjectStreamClass, causing a compile error or InaccessibleObjectException when accessing serialVersionUID without the @Serial annotation in some strict environments or future JDKs, though primarily this is a modernization for clarity and compliance with new serialization best practices enforced by tools targeting Java 17+.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17 serialization best practices.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for more concise string interpolation.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.after:
super("You have reached the limit for %s with the %s plan. Please, contact with the clinic owner to ask for a plan upgrade.".formatted(
			resourceName, plan));

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.after: super("%s not found with %s: '%s'".formatted(resourceName, fieldName, fieldValue));

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17 serialization best practices.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.before: super(String.format("You need to be subscribed to plan %s to access this feature and you have plan %s.", expected, current));
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.after: super("You need to be subscribed to plan %s to access this feature and you have plan %s.".formatted(expected, current));

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with stricter serialization checks in newer JDKs.
